budgetInsights.under_5L: Under ₹5 lakh, the Renault Kwid and Maruti S-Presso are the most shortlisted budget picks here.
budgetInsights.5L_to_8L: In the ₹5–8 lakh range, automatic hatchbacks are the most test-driven segment. The Hyundai i20 and Maruti Baleno lead shortlists this week.
budgetInsights.8L_to_12L: Between ₹8–12 lakh, compact SUVs are getting the most interest — the Tata Nexon and Hyundai Venue are top picks.
budgetInsights.above_12L: Above ₹12 lakh, the Kia Seltos and Hyundai Creta SX(O) Turbo are seeing strong demand.

bodyTypeInsights.hatchback: Hatchbacks are the fastest-moving cars at this hub. Automatics tend to get test-driven 40% more than manuals.
bodyTypeInsights.sedan: Sedans are steady movers — the Honda City and Hyundai Verna are the most viewed in this segment.
bodyTypeInsights.suv: SUVs are the most searched body type. Compact SUVs under ₹12 lakh dominate. The Tata Nexon has been test-driven 14 times in the last 14 days.
bodyTypeInsights.muv: MPVs like the Maruti Ertiga are popular with family buyers — especially the CNG variant for lower running costs.

transmissionInsights.automatic: Automatic cars get significantly more test drives at this hub. Most buyers here are city commuters who prefer convenience over cost.
transmissionInsights.manual: Manual cars offer better value — typically ₹1–1.5 lakh less than equivalent automatics.

weeklyHighlights: Tata Nexon XZA+ has been test-driven 14 times this week — the most of any car at this hub
Hyundai i20 Sportz Automatic is getting consistent shortlists from city commute buyers
Maruti Baleno Alpha (Automatic) was the most test-driven hatchback last week
Kia Seltos GTX+ had 3 buyers make purchase enquiries after test drives this week
